query:
SELECT 
  rating,
  indexador,
  incentivado,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,6))) * 10000, 1) as avg_bps,
  ROUND(MIN(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,6))) * 10000, 1) as min_bps,
  ROUND(MAX(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,6))) * 10000, 1) as max_bps,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_outlier = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as outliers
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE rating IS NOT NULL 
  AND zspread IS NOT NULL
  AND CAST(score_match AS DECIMAL(5,4)) >= 0.85
GROUP BY rating, indexador, incentivado
ORDER BY indexador, rating, incentivado;
